title: The World Around Us Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Putting seeds or young plants in the soil so they can grow.
rounds.explanation: planting: Putting seeds or young plants in the soil so they can grow.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The main part of a plant that holds up the leaves and flower.
rounds.explanation: stem: The main part of a plant that holds up the leaves and flower.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The brown earth on the ground where plants grow.
rounds.explanation: soil: The brown earth on the ground where plants grow.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Giving water to plants to help them grow.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: The planet we all live on; our home.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Planting trees helps clean the air and gives us shade.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Please do not drop litter; use a bin instead.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Water travels up the stem to reach the leaves.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The main part of a plant that holds up the leaves and flower.
rounds.explanation: stem: The main part of a plant that holds up the leaves and flower. Water travels up the stem to reach the leaves.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'leaves'?
rounds.explanation: leaves: The flat, usually green parts that grow from the stem. The green leaves make food for the plant using sunlight.

rounds.prompt: The garden is full of beautiful ____s.
rounds.explanation: flower: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds. The garden is full of beautiful flowers.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'picking up'?
rounds.explanation: Picking up litter keeps our street clean.

rounds.prompt: Please do not drop ____; use a bin instead.
rounds.explanation: Please do not drop litter; use a bin instead.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: Recycling paper helps save trees.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 — Talk About Environmental Actions
Speaking 3 — Say Thank You to Nature
Speaking 5 - Earth-Care Reporter
rounds.target: Describe six people caring for the environment using is or are plus -ing.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: A bird built its nest in the tall tree.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The seeds grew well in the soft soil.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I am happy for the trees, water and clean air.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'flower' mean in this unit?
choices: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds.
Putting seeds or young plants in the soil so they can grow.
Giving water to plants to help them grow.
rounds.answer: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds.
rounds.explanation: flower: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds.

rounds.prompt: What does 'glad' mean in this unit?
choices: Putting seeds or young plants in the soil so they can grow.
Giving water to plants to help them grow.
rounds.explanation: glad: Feeling pleased or happy.

rounds.prompt: What does 'watering' mean in this unit?
choices: Rubbish that people leave on the ground in public places.
Giving water to plants to help them grow.
Putting seeds or young plants in the soil so they can grow.
rounds.answer: Giving water to plants to help them grow.
rounds.explanation: watering: Giving water to plants to help them grow.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'air'?
rounds.explanation: air is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'appreciate'?
rounds.explanation: appreciate is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'roots'?
rounds.explanation: roots is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: Making used things, like paper, into something new to use again.
The main part of a plant that holds up the leaves and flower.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: The colourful part of a plant that makes seeds.
A tall plant with a wooden trunk, branches and leaves.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Please do not drop ____; use a bin instead.
rounds.explanation: Please do not drop litter; use a bin instead.

rounds.prompt: Which spelling is correct?
rounds.explanation: Recycling paper helps save trees.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The parts of a plant that grow underground and take in water.
rounds.explanation: roots: The parts of a plant that grow underground and take in water. The roots of the big tree go deep into the ground.
